title: This company pays up to $1000 for one referral #affiliatemarketing
spoken_script:
# HubSpot Affiliate Script - 45 Seconds

Here's the thing. HubSpot's affiliate program pays up to one thousand dollars per person you refer. One person.

Their CRM is actually the best free option for small businesses out there. So recommending it? That's not selling out. That's just being honest.

One referral a month at their average payout is legitimate money. We're talking thousands a month passive income.

But here's what most people get wrong. You don't need a million followers. You need the right content in front of the right person.

Compare this to Ahrefs at two hundred per sale. WP Engine, same deal. Kinsta gives you ten percent recurring forever.

HubSpot is the move.

Full breakdown of all their affiliate programs in the link. Bio. Check it out.
